messenger.register.success: ✅ Registered as %q. When you join a meeting under this name, you'll receive a confirmation message.
messenger.register.name_taken: ⚠️ The name %q is already registered by another account. Ask your teacher to remove the existing entry from the registry page, then try again.
messenger.join_confirm.prompt: 📍 Did you just join meeting `%s` on *%s*?
messenger.join_confirm.yes_result: ✅ Confirmed! Your presence is being tracked for this meeting.
messenger.join_confirm.no_result: ❎ Not confirmed. Your presence will not be tracked in this session.
messenger.join_confirm.dropped: Verification cancelled — you left the meeting before confirming.
messenger.join_confirm.timed_out: ⏰ Verification timed out. Rejoin the meeting to receive a new confirmation prompt.
messenger.join_confirm.collision: ⚠ Verification cancelled — another participant joined under the name %q. Ask your teacher to resolve the conflict, then rejoin the meeting.
messenger.challenge.reply_hint.text: Please reply to this message with your answer.
messenger.challenge.reply_hint.numeric: Please reply to this message with a number.
